# opnsense_auth_user (Data Source)

Reads a local user on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `authorized_keys` (String) Authorized SSH public keys.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether this account is disabled.
- `email` (String) Email address.
- `expires` (String) Account expiry date (mm/dd/yyyy, empty = never).
- `full_name` (String) Full name / description.
- `group_memberships` (Set of String) Group UUIDs the user belongs to.
- `landing_page` (String) Page shown after login.
- `language` (String) Preferred GUI language.
- `name` (String) Login name (unique).
- `password` (String) User password (write-only; never read back from the API).
- `privileges` (Set of String) Assigned privilege identifiers.
- `shell` (String) Login shell.
- `uid` (Number) Numeric user ID (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
